summary: SEO Phase 1 Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests pass (100%). All SEO endpoints working correctly: sitemap.xml with user cards, link pages, and store pages; robots.txt with correct directives and sitemap reference; meta endpoints returning title, description, OG tags, and Schema.org JSON-LD. Frontend: SEOHead component PARTIALLY WORKING - dynamic meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, twitter cards) are injected correctly but Schema.org JSON-LD script is not being rendered (expo-router/head limitation).

integration_issues.issue: Schema.org JSON-LD script tag is not being rendered by expo-router/head. The <script type='application/ld+json'> with dangerouslySetInnerHTML is not being injected into the DOM. This is a limitation of expo-router/head which doesn't fully support script tags.

Static meta tags from base HTML appear before dynamic tags. While dynamic tags with data-rh='true' are correctly injected, the static defaults (og:title='i'M On Social') appear first in the DOM. Most crawlers should handle this correctly by using the last occurrence.

action_items: OPTIONAL: To fully support Schema.org JSON-LD, consider implementing server-side rendering (SSR) for public pages or using a different approach like injecting the script tag directly in the page component outside of Head
OPTIONAL: Remove or conditionally render the static OG meta tags in the base HTML template to avoid duplication
critical_code_review_comments: Backend seo.py router is well-structured with proper helper functions _base_url and _slug
Meta endpoints correctly handle missing users/stores by returning {error: 'not_found'} instead of HTTP errors
sitemap.xml correctly includes lastmod, changefreq, and priority attributes
robots.txt correctly references the sitemap URL with dynamic base URL
aggregateRating is properly calculated from approved testimonials with rating >= 4
worksFor LocalBusiness is included when user has a store_id
SEOHead component fetches meta data correctly but expo-router/head doesn't support script tags
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Phase 1 backend is complete and working. All endpoints return correct data. The frontend SEOHead component successfully injects dynamic meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, twitter cards, canonical URL) via expo-router/head. The only limitation is that Schema.org JSON-LD script tag is not being rendered due to expo-router/head not supporting script tags with dangerouslySetInnerHTML. This may require server-side rendering for full SSR/SEO support.

backend.GET /api/seo/robots.txt: PASS - Returns proper directives (Allow: /card/, /l/, /card/store/, Disallow: /admin/, /api/), includes Sitemap reference
backend.GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml: PASS - Valid XML sitemap with urlset namespace, contains user cards (/card/{id}), link pages (/l/{username}), and store pages (/card/store/{slug})
backend.GET /api/seo/meta/card/{user_id}: PASS - Returns title, description, url, image, type, and schema (Person with aggregateRating and worksFor LocalBusiness)
backend.GET /api/seo/meta/link/{username}: PASS - Returns Person schema for link pages (invalid usernames return error)
backend.GET /api/seo/meta/store/{slug}: PASS - Returns LocalBusiness schema with numberOfEmployees (invalid slugs return error)

frontend./card/{userId} SEOHead: PARTIAL - Title: ✅, og:title: ✅, og:description: ✅, og:image: ✅, twitter cards: ✅, canonical: ✅, JSON-LD: ❌
frontend./l/{username} SEOHead: PARTIAL - Same pattern as card page (meta tags work, JSON-LD doesn't)
frontend./card/store/{slug} SEOHead: PARTIAL - Same pattern (meta tags work, JSON-LD doesn't)
